subcodes.first_line: Blessed be God for thy coming, thy receptivity and thy enkindlement. He counseleth thee to observe discretion in all circumstances. Be thou steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بارک الله لک ورودک و اقبالک و اشتعالک و یوصیک بالستر فیکل الاحوال کن متمسکا
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
